html:
2026-0588
2026-06-11CHIndigenous Languages ActAppointment of the Commissioner of Indigenous Languages, on an interim basisAppointment of Candice St-Aubin of Gatineau, Quebec, to be Commissioner of Indigenous Languages, on an interim basis, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of ninety days or until she is no longer required to act as Commissioner, whichever occurs first, effective July 13, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Commissioner of Indigenous Languages, on an interim basis
precis: Appointment of Candice St-Aubin of Gatineau, Quebec, to be Commissioner of Indigenous Languages, on an interim basis, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of ninety days or until she is no longer required to act as Commissioner, whichever occurs first, effective July 13, 2026.
